pr_text:
## Title: Fix stale protocol state cleanup in MCH generation and FEC encoding

### Summary
The LTE PHY MCH (Multicast Channel) generation path fails to reset protocol state after procedure completion, causing stale HARQ process state and lingering FIFO elements to persist. After `generate_mch_khz_1dot25()` completes MCH generation, the HARQ process remains active with non-zero round count and status other than idle. Similarly, the FEC encoding function `dlsch_encoding_fembms_pmch()` can leave re
